subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that thou didst turn in faith, believe, hearken and respond when the Call was raised betwixt earth and heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انک اقبلت و آمنت و سمعت و اجبت اذ ارتفع الندآء بین الارض و السماء و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
